name: taskara
description: Connect Codex directly to Taskara's back office for cleaning and facility-service teams.

interface.shortDescription: Run your Taskara back office from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect securely with Taskara OAuth, read live operational data, and create tasks or schedule entries directly from Codex. Browser operation remains available for unsupported workflows.
defaultPrompt: Show me today's Taskara schedule and urgent tasks.
Create a Taskara job for tomorrow.
Draft a Taskara quote for a customer.
